backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a vehicle service booking system with types for vehicle, capacity, service, and cleaning options; exposes CRUD-like functions to create, retrieve, update status, and assign mechanics to bookings stored in a Map.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference for the project's frontend architecture and component responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file that defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Cleanio React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the TypeScript entry point via Vite.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (home, full-service, repair, cleaning, confirmation, admin), wrapping admin routes in ProtectedAdminRoute and the whole app in AdminAuthProvider.
frontend/src/components/AdminLoginForm.t: Password login form for the admin area featuring show/hide toggle, inline error feedback on wrong password, and a loading spinner during the simulated verification delay.
frontend/src/components/BookingForm.tsx: Shared booking form component handling customer details, vehicle type, capacity, and time slot selection for all service types; builds the appropriate CleaningSubOption variant and submits the booking to the backend before navigating to the confirmation page.
frontend/src/components/ChatBot.tsx: React component that renders a chat interface with bot/user message bubbles, a typing indicator, quick-reply buttons, and a free-text input field for the repair conversation flow.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component providing a sticky header with navigation links, responsive mobile menu, main content slot, and a footer with branding.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedAdminRo: Route guard component that renders the AdminLoginForm if the user is not authenticated, otherwise renders the protected children.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.tsx: Context-based hook providing simple password-based admin authentication with localStorage persistence, exposing login, logout, and isAuthenticated state.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, managing login status, identity state, and delegation validity.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for CRUD operations on bookings, including fetching all/single bookings, creating bookings, updating status, and assigning mechanics via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useRepairConversation: Stateful hook managing a multi-step chatbot conversation flow for diagnosing bike repair issues, tracking messages, conversation step, and collected issue details.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts and Tailwind directives, defines the Cleanio brand design tokens (deep charcoal + electric orange) as CSS custom properties, and adds reusable component and utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AdminBookingsPage.tsx: Admin page that lists all bookings with status update and mechanic assignment controls, using React Query hooks to fetch and mutate booking data.
frontend/src/pages/BookingConfirmationPa: Confirmation page displayed after a successful booking, showing booking details (ID, customer, service, time slot, status, mechanic) fetched via the booking ID from URL search params.
frontend/src/pages/CleaningPage.tsx: Service page for the Cleaning option that lets users choose between Colour Foam Washing (₹199) and Normal Foam Washing (₹149) before rendering the shared BookingForm.
frontend/src/pages/FullServicePage.tsx: Service page for Full Service that displays a checklist of included maintenance items and renders the BookingForm with capacity selector and pricing enabled.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page that showcases the three services (Full Service, Repair, Cleaning) as cards and highlights key features like doorstep delivery, same-day slots, and AI diagnostics, with navigation buttons to each service page.
frontend/src/pages/RepairPage.tsx: Repair service page that combines an AI chatbot (useRepairConversation hook) for issue diagnosis and, once the conversation is complete, displays a BookingForm pre-filled with repair details and service type.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Inter, Poppins), OKLCH-based color tokens (brand-orange, charcoal, semantic UI colors), custom border radii, box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for 'Cleanio' tracking version, known issues, and a pending fix request (AR-1) to add a visible admin access link in the site footer's Layout.tsx component.
